programmes.show_description: Western revenge drama with Raquel Welch. A woman enlists the aid of a bounty hunter to track down the outlaws who murdered her husband, assaulted her, and burned down her family home. (1971)
Sci-fi thriller with Sylvester Stallone. In a dystopian regime where a cross-country race requires contestants to brutally run down innocent pedestrians, a rebel leader plans to sabotage it. (1975)
Supersized seismic scares. When a powerful earthquake threatens to obliterate California, a team of scientists begin a deadly race against time to detonate a volcano and counter the tremors. (2019)
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
Challenger is caught in a trap and freed by some children and then finds himself in trouble with their protector. S2, Ep13/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Apocalyptic chills and thrills. When melting glaciers trigger an ice age across the Northern Hemisphere, a family tries to make their way out of the frozen wasteland they once called home. (2019)

Colt goes to South Carolina in pursuit of a bail-jumper accused of killing the man he holds responsible for his father's death. S2, Ep19
Action thriller with John Cusack. A racing champion-turned-driving instructor ends up fleeing the law when he is tricked into becoming the getaway driver for a bank robber. (2014)
Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by participating in underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest. (1990)
